name: MARCH Protocol
description: Ukulandelana okuyinhloko kokuphathwa kokuhlukumezeka okusetshenziswe ku-Tactical Combat Casualty Care. Ibhekana nezimbangela eziphambili zokufa okuvinjelwayo okugwemekayo ngendlela ebaluleke kakhulu: ukopha okukhulu, Umoya, Ukuphefumula, Ukujikeleza, I-Hypothermia.
